arts.ttl: Endrick: "I'm very pleased with my goal and to help the team"
arts.sum: “I'm here to help by scoring goals or defending and winning trophies. The forward gave his impressions on Realmadrid TV about a dramatic tie that secured a place in the final of the Copa: “I love experiencing this madness, even though I like to win as soon as possible and celebrate with the fans and the bench.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: "We're in the final again and we've achieved our objective"
arts.sum: We lacked balance, but we're very effective up front because it's not so easy to score four goals against Real Sociedad.” Carlo Ancelotti spoke in the press room at the Santiago Bernabéu after his team booked their place in the Copa del Rey final: “It was an entertaining match, with lots of goals, lots of mistakes and lots of good things.

arts.ttl: Managing Madrid Podcast: Real Madrid 4 - 4 Real Sociedad, Post-game, Copa del Rey 2024 - 2025
arts.sum: On this episode of the Managing Madrid Podcast, Kiyan Sobhani, Leah Revelle, and Mehedi Hassan discuss: Kiyan, Leah, and Mehedi (live from the Bernabeu!) break down a wild semi-final

arts.ttl: Bernabéu erupts as Rüdiger’s late show seals Copa del Rey final spot for Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid 4-4 Real Sociedad (agg 5-4) Defender heads dramatic extra-time winner At one minute past midnight a self-declared madman sent the Santiago Bernabéu into a state of delirium and Real Madrid into the final of the Copa del Rey. El Loco leapt above the Real Sociedad defence and into the stands at the north end of this stadium, where supporters had seen their team go and do it again, their way. It had been long, it had been wild, and at the end of the night, somehow they were the ones celebrating, which it seems they always are. Madrid did not win and were not always very good until they were irresistible, but it was enough. Three times they had trailed but ultimately a draw, secured by the thumping forehead of Antonio Rüdiger in the 115th minute was enough. A game that went from 0-1 to 1-1, 1-3 to 3-3, and then 3-4 finally finished 4-4 deep into extra time. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta provides injury update on Arsenal stars Gabriel and Jurrien Timber ahead of Champions League showdown with Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal's 2-1 victory against Fulham on Tuesday night was marred by injuries to defensive duo Gabriel and Jurrien Timber ahead of their Champions League tie against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 4-4 Real Sociedad (agg 5-4): Los Blancos overturn two-goal deficit to reach Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid, will play either Barcelona or Atletico Madrid in next month’s Copa del Rey final in Seville next month

arts.ttl: Arsenal injury news: Gabriel, Jurrien Timber forced off ahead of Real Madrid showdown, who could partner William Saliba?
arts.sum: Arsenal defenders Gabriel and Jurrien Timber are doubts for the Champions League clash with Real Madrid after being forced off with injury against Fulham this evening.

arts.ttl: Arteta facing defensive injury crisis ahead of Real Madrid clash
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta faces an anxious wait over the fitness of four defenders ahead of next week's Champions League quarter-final first leg against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid (5)4-4(4) Real Sociedad: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Los Blancos survive major scare to reach Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Real Madrid survive a major scare to seal their place in the Copa del Rey final with a dramatic 5-4 aggregate victory over Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid needs extra time to oust Real Sociedad and advance to Copa del Rey final
arts.sum: Madrid had won the first leg 1-0 in February, but Sociedad took the second leg 4-3 after Mikel Oyarzabal scored in stoppage time in regulation, when both teams scored twice after the 80th minute. Real Madrid needed extra time to get past Real Sociedad and reach its second Copa del Rey final in three seasons on Tuesday.
